pyrrolin.t: [医] 吡咯啉, 二氢吡咯

pyrroline.d:
n. A nitrogenous base, C4H7N, obtained as a colorless
   liquid by the reduction of pyrrol.

pyrrolinium compound.t: [化] 吡咯啉化合物; 五价氮吡咯啉化合物

pyrrolinyl.t: 吡咯啉基, 氮(杂)环戊烯

pyrroloquinoline.t: [化] 吡咯并喹啉; 任何含有一个吡咯环及一个喹啉环的

pyrrosia.t: [网络] 石韦属；石苇属；石苇家族

pyrus.d: n fruit trees native to the Old World: pears

pyrus communis.t: [网络] 西洋梨；西洋梨子；梨树

pyruvate oxidation factors.t: [医] 丙酮酸氧化因子, 硫辛酸

pyruvate phosphokinase.t: [化] 丙酮酸激酶; 丙酮酸磷酸激酶

pyruvic.d:
a. Pertaining to, or designating, an acid (called also
   pyroracemic acid) obtained, as a liquid having a pungent odor, by the
   distillation of racemic acid.

pyruvic acid.t:
[化] 乙酰甲酸; 丙酮酸
[医] 丙酮酸

pyruvic alcohol.t: [化] 丙酮醇; 羧基丙酮

pyruvic dehydrogenase.t:
[化] 丙酮酸脱氢酶; 丙酮酸氧化酶
[医] 丙酮酸脱氢酶

pyruvic ketolase.t:
[化] 丙酮酸酮酶
[医] 丙酮酸酮酶

pyruvic oxidase.t:
[化] 丙酮酸氧化酶
[医] 丙酮酸氧化酶, 丙酮酸脱氢酶

pyrvinium chloride.t: [化] 吡维氯铵; 氯化扑蛲灵

pyrvinium pamoate.t: [化] 恩波维铵; 扑蛲灵

pyrylium.t: [化] 吡┘; 吡喃┘; 吡喃┹

pysanka.t: n. 乌克兰复活节彩蛋

pythagoras.d: n. Greek philosopher and mathematician who proved the Pythagorean theorem; considered to be the first true mathematician (circa 580-500 BC)

pythagorean.d: a. of or relating to Pythagoras or his geometry

pythagorean theorem.t: 毕达哥拉斯定理, 勾股定理

pythagoreanism.d: n. The doctrines of Pythagoras or the Pythagoreans.

pythagoreans.t: (Pythagorean 的复数) a. 毕达哥拉斯的
pythagoreans.d:
plural of Pythagorean
a. of or relating to Pythagoras or his geometry

pythagorico-platonic.t: [网络] 毕达哥拉斯 - 柏拉图式

pytheas.t: 皮西亚斯(公元前三世纪的古希腊航海家、地理学家)

pythia.d: n (Greek mythology) the priestess of Apollo at Delphi who transmitted the oracles

pythiaceae.t: [网络] 腐霉科；腐霉菌科；草苗立炫f菌科

pythiad.d:
n. The period intervening between one celebration of the
   Pythian games and the next.

pythian.t: (古希腊)达尔菲(Delphi)地方的, 达尔菲的居民
pythian.d:
a. Of or pertaining to Delphi, to the temple of Apollo, or to
   the priestess of Apollo, who delivered oracles at Delphi.

pythian games.t: na. 在达尔菲每四年举行一次的古代希腊四大运动会之一

pythians.t: (Pythian 的复数) (古希腊)达尔菲(Delphi)地方的, 达尔菲的居民
pythians.d:
plural of Pythian
a. Of or pertaining to Delphi, to the temple of Apollo, or to
   the priestess of Apollo, who delivered oracles at Delphi.

pythias.t: n. (罗马民间传说中的)皮西厄斯(与其友Damon为生死之交)
pythias.d:
n friend of Damon; Phintias (according to legend) was condemned to death by Dionysius the Elder and asked a respite to put his affairs in order; Damon pledged his life for the return of his friend; when Phintias returned in time the tyrant released them both (4th century BC)
n (Greek mythology) the priestess of Apollo at Delphi who transmitted the oracles

pythium debaryanum.t: [网络] 德巴利腐霉；猝倒病；腐霉菌

pythius.t: [网络] 披提欧斯；皮提亚的；吕底亚人派非亚斯

python.d:
n. large Old World boas
n. a soothsaying spirit or a person who is possessed by such a spirit
n. (Greek mythology) dragon killed by Apollo at Delphi

python reticulatus.t: [网络] 网纹蟒；蟒蛇皮；网纹巨蛇

python sebae.t: [网络] 非洲岩蟒；英文名；拉丁学名

pythoness.t: n. 女预言家, 女巫
pythoness.d: n. a witch with powers of divination

pythonic.t: a. 神谕的, 预言的, 大蟒蛇的
pythonic.d: a. Prophetic; oracular; pretending to foretell events.

pythoninae.d: n. Old World boas: pythons; in some classifications considered a separate family from Boidae

pythons.t: n. 巨蛇, 大蟒( python的复数形式 )
pythons.d:
n. large Old World boas
n. a soothsaying spirit or a person who is possessed by such a spirit
n. (Greek mythology) dragon killed by Apollo at Delphi

pyuria.d: n. presence of white blood cells in the urine; symptom of urinary tract infection

pyvinium pamoate.t: [医] 扑蛲灵, 扑蛲喹(驱蛲虫药)

pyx.t:
n. 圣体容器, 硬币样品盒
vt. 检验(硬币的)重量和纯度
pyx.d:
n. a chest in which coins from the mint are held to await assay
n. any receptacle in which wafers for the Eucharist are kept

pyxides.t: n. (pyxis的复数)药箱, 宝石盒,[植]盖果
pyxides.d:
n fruit of such plants as the plantain; a capsule whose upper part falls off when the seeds are released
n a constellation in the southern hemisphere near Puppis and Antlia
n a small box used by ancient Greeks to hold medicines

pyxidia.t: n. 盖果( pyxidium的名词复数 )

pyxidium.d: n. fruit of such plants as the plantain; a capsule whose upper part falls off when the seeds are released

pyxie.d: n creeping evergreen shrub having narrow overlapping leaves and early white star-shaped flowers; of the pine barrens of New Jersey and the Carolinas

pyxis.t:
n. 有盖瓶, 小箱
[医] 盖果
pyxis.d:
n. a constellation in the southern hemisphere near Puppis and Antlia
n. a small box used by ancient Greeks to hold medicines
